description: A public synthetic export task whose format requirement changed after interruption.

create_input.goal: Finish the report export feature under the latest product contract.
create_input.session_material: The interrupted session implemented a streaming CSV exporter and wrote CSV-only tests from the original contract.
constraints: Do not add a third-party serialization dependency.
decisions: Keep the exporter streaming to bound memory use.

evidence.content: The accepted design uses an iterator to stream rows without buffering the report.
The existing suite verifies only text/csv output.

additional_evidence.content: Version 2 requires both CSV and newline-delimited JSON selected by an explicit format argument.

continuation_context: The continuation session must update tests before completing the exporter.

checkpoint.goal: Finish the report export feature under the latest product contract.

confirmed_facts.text: The current implementation and tests cover CSV only.

decisions.text: Keep the exporter streaming to bound memory use.

open_questions.question: Has the export format contract changed since the interruption?

next_steps.action: Confirm the current export formats before completing implementation.
next_steps.verification: The current contract is cited in the task notes.

findings.summary: The CSV-only checkpoint conflicts with the new CSV and JSON requirement.
findings.recommendation: Replace the CSV-only assumption with the version 2 format contract.

findings.summary: The existing CSV-only tests no longer cover the accepted behavior.
findings.recommendation: Add newline-delimited JSON tests before finishing implementation.

concise_context.text: The latest contract requires streaming CSV and newline-delimited JSON.

next_steps.action: Update the tests for an explicit CSV or JSON format argument.
next_steps.validation: Both CSV and newline-delimited JSON cases fail before implementation changes.

next_steps.action: Extend the streaming exporter with standard-library JSON serialization.
next_steps.validation: Both format suites pass while the iterator-based design remains intact.

do_not.text: Do not add a third-party serialization dependency.
Do not preserve the obsolete CSV-only assumption.
